title: All-Inclusive Hay Bales: Pride Edition
description: A mod adding hay bales with different colored bindings to represent the LGBTQ+ community and show your pride!
body:
![All-Inclusive Hay Bales](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df66ede015658723a1a17accb89d328468b80db2.png)

## Description
Do you want to decorate with hay bales, but find that their binding color just doesn't work with your build?  *All-Inclusive Hay Bales* offers a variety of hay bale bindings to suit your decoration needs.

### Features:
- Dye hay bale bindings with one of the 16 Minecraft colors
- Shapeless crafting recipes for binding colors matching a variety of flags
- Recipes added to the recipe book upon picking up a hay bale
- Remove the dye by interacting with a cauldron containing water while holding the hay bale
- In-game documentation is available via [Treatise](https://modrinth.com/mod/treatise) if installed

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
